content.en:
After the Blood Shadow Mountain agreed to trade with Ye Tian, they agreed on a place to trade.

Emperor Astral Boundary.

It's also an open territory, with a lot of forces having branches here, and there's a lot of trading here.

Many of the Fifth Stage Great Ancestors would occasionally come here to trade, and it was very rare to kill people and steal goods.

this day.

Ye Tian agreed with the Heaven Breaking Ancestor and Zhenyuan Great Ancestor of the Blood Shadow Mountain to trade here.

Soon, the two sides met.

"Zhenyuan Great Ancestor!"

"Heaven Breaking Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said politely when he saw these two invincible fifth-stage great ancestors.

"Endless Ancestor, have you brought something?" asked the Heavenbreaker Ancestor.

Ye Tian nodded: "Blood Realm Underworld, did you bring it?"

"Hmm!"

The Heaven-Breaking Ancestor responded.

After that, it's time to trade.

Ye Tian and the Heaven Breaking Great Ancestor both took out the treasures, and after confirming that they were correct, they began to trade.

"It's here!"

Ye Tian put away the Blood Realm Underworld Wood and was secretly excited.

With it, he could completely cultivate the ten-armed golden body, which greatly increased his strength.

At that time, he would definitely be infinitely close to the strength of the Invincible Rank Fifth Stage Great Ancestor.

Of course.

His own foundation was too strong, so it was impossible for him to directly step into the fifth stage of the invincible level.

He wanted to become an invincible-level fifth-stage combat force, and he could only do so after his cultivation broke through to the fifth-stage.

......

Genki Zero Realm, the interior of the Ruins Stone Tower.

Ye Tian began to cultivate the ten-armed golden body, guiding the power of the immeasurable supernatural power inside the immeasurable bone to turn into the ten-armed golden body seed imprint.

After he breaks through to the fifth stage, he will turn into a real ten-armed golden body.

Of course.

Cultivating the ten-armed golden body may also fail, but the materials on Ye Tian's body are still enough for him to cultivate several times, as long as he succeeds once.

Ye Tian felt that with his potential, there was a high probability of success.

"Let's get started!"

After Ye Tian distributed the ten materials, he began to refine them, integrating them into his immeasurable bones, and forming a mark according to the cultivation method of the ten-armed golden body.

Time passed slowly, and finally on a certain day.

Rumble!!!!

A ten-armed golden figure appeared on Ye Tian's body, which meant that he had successfully cultivated the mark.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

After cultivating the ten-armed golden body, he was ready to attack the fifth stage.

The fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform impacting the fifth stage only needs to give birth to the immeasurable supernatural technique, and the body can be successfully transformed and the fifth-stage Great Ancestor can be achieved.

If the Fourth Stage Great Ancestor, who only tempered his whole body nine times, to attack the Fifth Stage, the success rate would be very low.

And Ye Tian had tempered his whole body thirteen times, and his success rate in hitting the fifth stage was very high.

Of course, he can also use resources to break through to the fifth stage.

For example, the Red Blood Immeasurable Fruit is a kind of hope that can increase the impact of the fifth stage.

At the beginning, he obtained such a treasure in the Ruins Stone Tower, but he ate it directly.

Now, the Red Blood Immeasurable Fruit is not a good thing for Ye Tian.

There are a lot of treasures on his body that can assist in the fifth stage, so he can almost 100% break through successfully.

"True Blood Bodhi Fruit!"

"Immeasurable Blood Phantom Lotus Seed!"

"Eternal Sumeru Flower!"

Ye Tian took out all kinds of resources to ensure that he could break through 100%.

Moreover, taking these treasures can also ensure that your foundation is stronger, and after breaking through, you can stabilize the realm faster.

Subsequently.

He took these resources and began to break through.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian continued to evolve the imprint of the Ten-Armed Golden Body Immeasurable Divine Power in his body, and made a breakthrough with the Ten-Armed Golden Body being the first Immeasurable Divine Power Technique.

Of course, he can also use the Infinite Feather Armor to break through, but it's all the same, there is no difference.

As Ye Tian continued to evolve, the ten-armed golden body became more and more condensed, and his aura became more and more powerful.

With the help of many resources, this breakthrough is 100% and there are no problems.

After a long time, the ten-armed golden body finally evolved and turned into a true immeasurable supernatural technique.

Rumble!!!

Endless energy poured into Ye Tian's body, helping him complete his physical transformation.

"Breakthrough!"

Ye Tian didn't have any accidents, he just silently waited for the flesh and blood body to transform to the fifth stage.

All the time, his strength is transforming.

After a long time, Ye Tian really became the fifth stage great ancestor steadily.

"With my current strength, I should have steadily stepped into the fifth stage of the invincible level!"

However, he didn't immediately go to the fourth floor of the Cosmos Tower.

He was going to practice a few more immeasurable magic techniques.

After all, every time you practice an immeasurable supernatural technique, you can make the flesh and blood body stronger, until the immeasurable supernatural power technique is completely useless, you need to find other ways to enhance your strength.

"Now that the ten-armed golden body has become a true immeasurable magic technique, the next step will be to make the immeasurable feather armor a real immeasurable magic power!"

So, he spent some time cultivating the Infinite Feather Armor into his second Infinite Divine Skill.

In the days that followed, he began to cultivate other immeasurable magical powers.

Anyway, he didn't lack resources, so one after another immeasurable magic skills were practiced by him.

It's just that his flesh and blood body is too powerful, so it is difficult for the top-notch immeasurable magic technique to make his flesh and blood body transform and increase his strength a little at most.

Therefore, his strength has been improving very slowly.

"If I practice the Heaven Slaying Blade, I should be able to have the fifth stage combat power of the Boundary Breaking Level!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After all, those boundary-breaking fifth-stage combat powers have all practiced several immeasurable supernatural powers on the immeasurable supernatural power list, or no less than the immeasurable supernatural power techniques on the immeasurable supernatural power list, but they have not been recorded.

"If you want to gather the materials needed for the Sky Slaying Blade, you may have to use the Eternal True Ruins!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He now has the invincible-level fifth-stage combat power, and he is also an invincible-level fifth-stage combat power who is not afraid of death, and he no longer needs the Infinite Realm Armor.

He himself can break through the Eternal Ruins again and again to gather enough resources.

Even if he encounters a creature with the fifth stage of combat power of the Boundary Breaking Level, he will have to wait for death and then copy a copy body.

......

In front of the Eternal True Ruins.

Ye Tian came here again, the reason why he came again was because he wanted to be seen by other Great Ancestors, otherwise his replica body would come out of the Eternal True Ruins in the future, and there would be no way to explain it.

"I hope we can find enough materials in the Eternal Ruins this time!"

Ye Tian muttered.
